subcodes.title: Words to Mr. McCarthy, spoken on 1912-10-06
subcodes.first_line: Is there any greater desire than this? It is a big desire. This desire cannot be compared to all others. It is hard to be steadfast
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @exhortations and counsels
